name: Diamond Transport Of VA LLC
recent_news: No M&A or news found; address (731 Walker Rd #D2, Great Falls VA) is a small suite that may be a mail/registered-agent location. Possibly confused with the larger, unrelated 'Diamond Transportation Services Inc' in Springfield VA (a 130+ vehicle paratransit operator). Not the same legal entity.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus operator and likely sub-scale (~5 employees, no confirmed school district contracts). Not a meaningful Summit tuck-in candidate; pass.

name: All Around Transport LLC
service_types: likely special-needs / NEMT or limo-style transport (per source tag)
recent_news: No M&A or operating news found. Listed only in basic business directories (Kompass, Yelp, VisualVisitor). PO Box registered address (PO Box 633, Lombard IL) and tiny employee count suggest an owner-operator outfit, not a contracted school-bus carrier. Several similarly-named freight/courier LLCs in the area are unrelated.
fit_notes: Sub-scale, no confirmed school district business, no fleet of yellow buses. Not a Summit tuck-in candidate.

name: ATS Apex Transit Solutions
recent_news: Founded/incorporated in Ohio in 2013; certified woman-owned. FMCSA SAFER shows 8 power units and 8 drivers, intrastate-only, passenger authority, no recent inspections or crashes in last 24 months. No school district contracts disclosed; no M&A activity.
fit_notes: Independent woman-owned NEMT micro-operator (~8 vehicles) in Cleveland. Not a yellow-bus school contractor; possible SPED/alt-transport overlay only. Likely too small and off-thesis for Summit yellow-bus tuck-in.

name: Friendly Ride Inc
service_types: likely NEMT / paratransit (Cleveland Heights address is a suite at 2490 Lee Blvd #304)
recent_news: No web footprint found; searches surface unrelated 'Friendly Ride' limo brands in NY/MA/IL. No school district contracts, no FMCSA snapshot tied to this address surfaced, no M&A. Appears to be a micro NEMT operator.
fit_notes: Sub-scale and not a confirmed school-bus operator. Not a Summit tuck-in candidate.

name: Open Arms Transportation

fit_notes: Captive adult day-care transport, not a K-12 school-bus contractor. Off-thesis for Summit; pass.
